questionHtml:
When intense physical activity is anticipated, which factor in the blood will increase the frequency of sinoatrial signals to heart muscle?

A. pH

B. Oxygen level

C. Thyroxin

D. Epinephrine

meta.title: When intense physical activity is anticipated, which factor in the blood will increase the frequency of sinoatrial signals to heart muscle? A. pH B. Oxygen level C. Thyroxin D. Epi
